title: Meta Launches Muse Spark AI Model
summary: Meta introduces Muse Spark, its first AI model since overhauling its AI efforts. The model is now available on the Meta AI app and website in the US.
body:
Meta Superintelligence Labs has launched Muse Spark, its first AI model since Mark Zuckerberg's significant investment in the company's AI efforts. This new model is initially powering the Meta AI app and the Meta AI website in the US. 

 The introduction of Muse Spark marks a significant step for Meta as it reenters the AI race. The model's capabilities and potential impact on the industry will be closely watched, especially as it begins to rollout across other Meta platforms. 

 In the coming weeks, Meta plans to integrate Muse Spark into WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger, further expanding its reach and potential applications. As the rollout progresses, reactions from users and the broader tech community will be important to monitor, along with any future developments or updates to the model.
twitterThread: 🚀 Meta is back in the AI game with Muse Spark! 🤖
Here's why this matters: Meta's billions of users will soon have access to this new AI tech. Let that sink in.
The wild part: Muse Spark is just the beginning. Meta's overhaul of its AI efforts is expected to bring more innovations.
This changes everything for Meta's platforms. Imagine AI-powered features across WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger.
The AI landscape just got a whole lot more interesting. What's next for Meta and its competitors?
standaloneTweet: Meta launches Muse Spark, its first AI model since the big overhaul! This AI tech will soon power WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and more. What does it mean for the future of AI? https://ainformed.dev/articles/meta-launches-muse-spark-ai-model
